tasks.name: Add Tab Navigation
tasks.prompt:
Add tab navigation to viewer/index.html for 4 main screens.

Requirements:
1. Add tab bar below header with 4 tabs: Runs, Config, Workspace, Pipelines
2. Update hash routing:
   - #/runs or #/ - runs list (default)
   - #/config - configuration screen
   - #/workspace - workspace screen  
   - #/pipelines - pipelines list
3. Style: horizontal tabs, active tab highlighted with accent color

Keep all existing functionality intact. Just add the tab infrastructure.

Edit viewer/index.html to add tab navigation.

tasks.name: Add Config Screen
tasks.prompt:
Add configuration screen to viewer/index.html for managing agents, skills, hooks.

Requirements:
1. Create Config screen with 3 sub-tabs: Agents, Skills, Hooks

2. Agents tab:
   - List agents as cards with name, description, model
   - Badge showing scope (global/project)
   - Edit button opens modal with textarea
   - Delete button with confirmation
   - + New Agent button at top

3. Skills tab: Same pattern as agents

4. Hooks tab:
   - Show hook profiles as cards (strict, standard, minimal)
   - Click to view details

5. Add scope toggle: Global (~/.claude) vs Project (.claude)

Use these API endpoints:
- GET /api/config/agents
- GET /api/config/skills  
- GET /api/config/hooks
- PUT /api/config/agents/{name}
- DELETE /api/config/agents/{name}

Edit viewer/index.html to add the config screen.

tasks.name: Add Workspace Screen
tasks.prompt:
Add workspace screen to viewer/index.html for task management and execution.

Requirements:
1. Workspace screen layout:
   - Repo selector dropdown at top
   - Browse button to select directory
   - Task list below

2. Task list:
   - Show tasks as cards with name, status
   - Show assigned agents/skills as tags
   - Run button to execute
   - Edit button to modify
   - Delete button

3. Task editor modal:
   - Name input
   - Prompt textarea
   - Model dropdown (opus, sonnet, haiku)
   - Effort dropdown (low, medium, high)
   - Agents multi-select (checkboxes from /api/config/agents)
   - Skills multi-select (checkboxes from /api/config/skills)
   - Workdir input
   - Save and Run buttons

4. Quick run panel:
   - Simple prompt input
   - Model selector
   - Run button

Use API: GET/POST /api/workspace/repos, /api/workspace/tasks

Edit viewer/index.html to add the workspace screen.

tasks.name: Add Pipeline Train Visualization
tasks.prompt:
Enhance pipeline screen in viewer/index.html with train-style visualization.

Requirements:
1. Train-style visualization:
   - Stages shown as connected boxes left to right
   - Each box shows: stage name, status badge, task count, cost
   - Animation when stage transitions (CSS transition)
   - Color coding: pending (gray), running (yellow pulse), done (green), failed (red)

2. Task breakdown:
   - Click stage to expand task list below
   - Show task status with icons
   - Click task to view output

3. Real-time updates:
   - Connect to /api/events SSE endpoint
   - Update stage status on events
   - Show progress bar for running tasks

Add CSS animations for the train effect. Keep existing pipeline functionality.

Edit viewer/index.html to enhance the pipeline screen.
